name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or enhancement

## Description
<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like -->

## Use case
<!-- Who benefits and why? e.g. "When estimating WoodWorks projects, we currently have to manually adjust..." -->

## Proposed solution
<!-- How would this feature work? Include any relevant domain details (scope types, formulas, DB changes, etc.) -->

## Alternatives considered
<!-- Other approaches you've thought about and why they were ruled out -->

## Additional context
<!-- Mockups, related issues, references to domain documentation, etc. -->
